headlines.headline: Source: Big 12 in no rush to pull lawsuit over Sorsby eligibility
headlines.description: The Big 12 presidents and chancellors haven't rushed to pull the league's recently filed federal lawsuit because there are still questions about Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby's NFL future and any possible legal retribution, a source told ESPN.

headlines.headline: Titans, DT Simmons reach 3-year extension with $100M guaranteed
headlines.description: The Titans and defensive tackle Jeffery Simmons have agreed to a three-year, $105.8M extension, his agents told ESPN's Adam Schefter and NFL Network's Ian Rapoport and Mike Garafolo.
